gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS < 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 AND MAX(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) > 2000 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE ASC

FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT geography_id
    FROM fact_household_consumption

    )

JOIN (
